userStories.title: Initialize Expo Project
userStories.description: Create mobile/ directory with Expo SDK 52+, TypeScript strict mode, and Expo Router for file-based navigation
acceptanceCriteria: mobile/ directory created with Expo SDK 52+
App runs on iOS simulator/Android emulator
Expo Router configured for file-based navigation
userStories.notes: Run: npx create-expo-app@latest mobile --template tabs-typescript, then clean up template files

userStories.title: Configure ESLint with FP Rules
userStories.description: Create eslint.config.mjs with FP rules, install eslint-plugin-fp and TypeScript ESLint packages
acceptanceCriteria: bun run lint passes on initial files

userStories.title: Set Up NativeWind (Tailwind CSS)
userStories.description: Install and configure NativeWind with Tailwind CSS, including design system colors
acceptanceCriteria: tailwind.config.js matches web design system colors (ink, paper, vermillion)
userStories.notes: Install: bun add nativewind tailwindcss, create tailwind.config.js with Phraser design tokens

userStories.title: Copy FP Facade Module
userStories.description: Copy lib/fp/ directory from web app to mobile/lib/fp/ with all FP utilities
acceptanceCriteria: mobile/lib/fp/ directory created with all FP utilities
userStories.notes: Copy files from src/lib/fp/ to mobile/lib/fp/, install: bun add fp-ts

userStories.title: Configure Jest Testing
userStories.description: Set up Jest with TypeScript support and React Native Testing Library

userStories.title: Write FP Module Tests
userStories.description: Create tests for FP modules (result.test.ts, option.test.ts)
acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover Ok/Err variants, map, andThen, unwrap methods

userStories.title: Create Base UI Components
userStories.description: Create Button, Card, and ScreenLayout components with NativeWind styling

userStories.title: Create App Screens
userStories.description: Create Expo Router screens: _layout.tsx, index.tsx, review.tsx, browse.tsx, settings.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: app/_layout.tsx with root layout and navigation
userStories.notes: Configure tabs in _layout.tsx, create placeholder screens with 'Coming Soon' text

userStories.title: Add Scripts to Root Package.json
userStories.description: Add convenience scripts for mobile app to root package.json
userStories.notes: Scripts: mobile:start, mobile:ios, mobile:android, mobile:test, mobile:lint
